seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Johann Engelbrecht - Marinda Kook

html:
He is my best friend, my life-companion, my beloved, my rock, the father of my children and the grandfather of Lea. This man is Johann Engelbrecht.

What a privilege it was to get the quiet man in my life in front of the cameras and behind the cooking pots. We cooked, literally and figuratively. Sometimes we let off steam and even had some backstage fun – no “pan” intended. The last episode of the second season of Easy With Marinda will always be close to my heart, just like my husband, Johann.

Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147.
